note: Project-scoped. Analytics/admin dashboards. Encodes NN/g progressive-disclosure discipline AND its expert-mode exception (where density IS the requirement) so the default is senior-level, not naive. Chart rules partly gate-able; disclosure rules route to the judge.

standards.rule: Three-layer progressive disclosure: glance-level KPIs default-visible, detail on click, configuration on deliberate intent.
Cap the default summary to 5-7 cards/metrics to respect working-memory limits.
Prefer bar over pie for comparison; length is judged ~3-4x faster than angle.
Charts encode by more than color: add pattern, texture, label, or direct-label (cross-cutting 1.4.1 + 1.4.11 graphical 3:1).
EXCEPTION: disable progressive disclosure for expert/operational-monitoring views where density is the point. Show the standard and its non-applicability condition.
Direct-label data series instead of distant legends where feasible.
